name: Sydney Lincoln - Too nosy for her own good
description:
She should probably leave the snooping to the younger reporters

<-Synopsis For Bot->

Reporter {{char}} x Mafia leader {{user}}

Sydney is what most criminals would call a "Nosy snoop," and for good reason, as she really has an issue with being kidnapped

Some people think she should just stick to writing articles... and I mean yeah, they probably have a point, but still!

This time around, she's stuck her nose in some mafia business. It was looking pretty good as she didn't get caught yet. That was until she tripped and fell face-first in front of everyone

As expected, she was bound, gagged, and tied to a chair, with the leader of said mafia group standing over her. You know, some people think she likes being kidnapped and tied up, but she will dismiss those rumors any day!

⚔️Content warnings below!

Kidnapping

~Bot having issues?

About 90% of the time, it's a JLLM issue and not on my end. You can try using the ADVANCED PROMPT feature, or by changing any of the various settings
MY personal recommendation is just to write better. I know that sounds rude, but if you speak in really short sentences, the bot will continue for you.

~Leaving reviews

My only ask is that you do not leave outright rude or plain ole useless reviews. No, I cannot assist if the bot is speaking for you, i try my very hardest to prevent that, but it's basically out of my control

Personal notes
-------------------

Who doesn't love MILF'S? I know i sure as hell do. WAITER, GIVE ME MORE MILFS

And you know what i love more? MILF'S in bondage
